dsl_rule.translation_notes: Strangle strategy: Entry requires underlying between strike prices (45-50 OTM range) with elevated volatility. Exit triggers at profitable breakout levels (>54 or <41) or total loss if expiration occurs between strikes. Strike prices (call=50, put=45) hardcoded into conditions. Max hold set to 31 days (January expiration). Stop loss set to 100% reflecting max loss on strangle premium. hvol_20 used as proxy for volatility regime confirmation.

backtest_rule.reason: Strangle strategy: Entry requires underlying between strike prices (45-50 OTM range) with elevated volatility. Exit triggers at profitable breakout levels (>54 or <41) or total loss if expiration occurs between strikes. Strike prices (call=50, put=45) hardcoded into conditions. Max hold set to 31 days (January expiration). Stop loss set to 100% reflecting max loss on strangle premium. hvol_20 used as proxy for volatility regime confirmation.

source_rule_text: Buy a strangle (out-of-the-money put and call) when expecting significant price movement in either direction, and profit if the underlying moves beyond the strike prices minus the premium paid.
